Afghanistan.notes: e-Visa: Visitors must arrive at Kabul International (KBL).. The Taliban accepts visas issued by diplomatic missions not under its control..

Algeria.notes: Application for a tourist visa to Algeria must be accompanied either by a certificate of accommodation.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel.. Visitors on tours organized to some southern regions by an approved travel agency may obtain a visa on arrival for up to 30 days.. Persons may be denied entry if entering with a passport containing visas or stamps issued by Israel..

Angola.notes: 30 days per trip, but no more than 90 days within any 1 calendar year for tourism purposes only.. Visitors must have a return/onward ticket and a hotel reservation confirmation.. An International Certificate of Vaccination is required..

Antigua and Barbuda.notes: Stringent application of rules regarding proof of sufficient funds, return ticket and accommodation..

Argentina.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Argentina under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.. Visitors are fingerprinted (Right thumb fingerprint) and photographed upon entry..

Armenia.notes: Obtainable on arrival at Zvartnots International Airport or prior to travel online..

Australia.notes: May apply online (Online Visitor e600 visa).. Transit visa is not required..

Austria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Azerbaijan.notes: If staying in Azerbaijan for more than ten days, visitors must register at the State Migration Service within three days of arrival.. Applicants of Armenian ancestry or with Armenian visas in their passport may be denied a visa.. Travellers with a visa or evidence of travel to the now-defunct Republic of Artsakh (stamps) are permanently denied entry. [ dubious – discuss ].

Bangladesh.notes: Not available at all entry points.. Available at Dhaka, Chittagong, and Sylhet international airports..

Belarus.notes: Must arrive and depart via Minsk International Airport..

Belgium.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Benin.notes: Must have an international vaccination certificate.. Three types of electronic visa are offered: the e-Visa valid for 30 days for a single entry (50 EUR), the e-Visa valid for 30 days for several (multiple) entries (75 EUR), and the e-Visa valid for 90 days to make several (multiple) entries (100 EUR)..

Bhutan.notes: The Sustainable Development Fee (SDF) of 200 USD per person, per night for almost all visitors to Bhutan. Additionally, if payment is made in US dollars from September 1, 2023 to August 31, 2027, the SDF is 100 USD..

Bolivia.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Bolivia under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Bosnia and Herzegovina.notes: 90 days within any 6-month period.. Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory..

Brazil.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Brazil under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Bulgaria.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Burkina Faso.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Burundi.notes: Visa on arrival obtainable at Bujumbura International Airport, and all land borders..

Cambodia.notes: Visa is also obtainable online.. All visitors are fingerprinted upon arrival and departure..

Cameroon.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis and current immunization records required..

Canada.notes: eTA required if arriving by air..

Central African Republic.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

China.notes: Visa-free from June 1, 2025 until December 31, 2026.. 240-hour (10-day) visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong SAR, China, Macau SAR, China or Taiwan (Province of China) ) using any mode of transport. Must have a confirmed onward ticket/itinerary, and enter through 1 of 64 approved ports. During which, may freely travel within the 24 provinces permitted for visa-free transit and engage in tourism, business, and visits... 24-hour visa-free transit to a third country or region (including Hong Kong SAR, China, Macau SAR, China, and Taiwan (Province of China)), is available at most international airports, without leaving the airport. Travellers who need to leave the airport may obtain a temporary entry permit from immigration... 5-day port visa (Visa on Arrival) for Shenzhen if arriving at designated ports of entry from Hong Kong SAR, China by land or sea, for stays within Shenzhen.. 3-day port visa (Visa on Arrival) if arriving in Zhuhai or Xiamen at designated ports of entry, for stays within the respective city.. 15-day visa-free entry for cruise ship passengers in tour groups, if arriving at any cruise port along China's coastline, including but not limited to Tianjin; Dalian; Shanghai; Lianyungang; Wenzhou; Zhoushan; Xiamen; Qingdao; Guangzhou; Shenzhen; Beihai; Haikou; Sanya. May further travel inland to all regions of coastal provinces (and equivalents) and Beijing.. May apply for a port visa (Visa on Arrival) if travelling for an urgent, qualified reason. Prior clearance for port visa is highly recommended or may be denied boarding by airlines..

Colombia.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Colombia under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Republic of the Congo.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.. A letter of invitation or written proof of a hotel reservation is required..

Democratic Republic of the Congo.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required.. Registration required..

Côte d'Ivoire.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Port Bouet Airport.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Croatia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Cuba.notes: Can be extended up to 90 days with a fee..

Czech Republic.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Denmark.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period regardless of previous time spent in other Schengen countries (except the other Nordic countries)..

Ecuador.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Ecuador under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check.. Extendable length of stay..

Egypt.notes: e-Visa issued for 30 days.. Visa-free travel for tourists arriving at Sharm El Sheikh, St. Catherine, or Taba airports and remaining in the Sinai resorts up to 15 days..

Equatorial Guinea.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required if you are traveling from a country with risk of yellow fever..

Estonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ethiopia.notes: Visa on arrival is obtainable only at Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Addis Ababa Bole International Airport.. e-Visa is available for 30 or 90 days.. Visitors are fingerprinted..

Finland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

France.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Gabon.notes: e-Visas are available for one to six months.. e-Visa holders must arrive via Libreville International Airport.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Gambia.notes: An entry clearance must be obtained from the Gambian Immigration prior to travel.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required only for travellers arriving high risk countries and having transited for more than 12 hours..

Germany.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Ghana.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Greece.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Hungary.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Iceland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

India.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via 32 designated airports or 5 designated seaports.. An Indian e-Tourist Visa may only be obtained twice within 1 calendar year.. Foreigners of Pakistani origin or who hold a Pakistani Passport are not eligible for an e-Visa. Foreigners who are not Pakistani nationals, but whose parents or grandparents (either paternal or maternal) were born in, or were permanent residents in Pakistan, are also not eligible for an e-Visa..

Iran.notes: Independent travelers must be accompanied by an authorized guide at all times..

Iraq.notes: As March 1 2023, all travelers traveling to the Kurdistan Region of Iraq will require a visa. Some citizens may obtain an e-Visa / visa on arrival, while others will need to apply an e-Visa through a guarantor (local sponsor)..

Israel.notes: Entry prohibited for any person "who knowingly issues a public call for boycotting Israel"..

Italy.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Jamaica.notes: Departure tax collected by airline for all arrivals by air..

Japan.notes: Persons who have been sentenced to 1 year or more of jail are not eligible for visa free travel to Japan and have to obtain visa..

Jordan.notes: Conditions apply.. Visa can be obtained upon arrival.. Not available at King Hussein/Allenby Bridge.

Kazakhstan.notes: Visa free was granted in 2014 under the Unilateral visa waiver for countries with high investment in Kazakhstan Economy.

Kenya.notes: Applications can be submitted up to 90 days prior to travel and must be submitted at least 3 days in advance.. eTA fee is 32.50 USD.. Proof of reservation at the hotel where visitors plan to stay is required (if staying with friends, an invitation letter is also acceptable).. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries..

Kiribati.notes: 90 days within any 12-month period.. May not exceed 90 days within any 12 months period..

South Korea.notes: The validity period of a K-ETA is 3 years from the date of approval..

Laos.notes: 18 of the 33 border crossings are only open to regular visa holders.. e-Visa may be used to enter Laos through the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 3 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges, in Boten (road and railroad ), and in Vientiane (at Khamsavath railway station ).. Visa on arrival is available at the Luang Prabang, Pakse and Vientiane international airports, 4 Thai-Lao Friendship Bridges and 7 border crossings..

Latvia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lebanon.notes: 1 month extendable for 2 additional months. Granted free of charge at Beirut International Airport or any other port of entry if there is no Israeli visa or seal, holding a telephone number, an address in Lebanon, and a non refundable return or circle trip ticket..

Libya.notes: Holders of passports bearing an Israeli visa or entry/exit stamps from Israel are not allowed to enter Libya..

Liechtenstein.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Lithuania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Luxembourg.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Madagascar.notes: For stays of 61 to 90 days, the visa fee is 59 USD..

Malawi.notes: Can extend for a total of 90 days..

Malaysia.notes: All visitors are fingerprinted on arrival and departure.. Immigration offenses, such as visa overstaying, are punishable by caning..

Malta.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Mauritania.notes: Available at Nouakchott–Oumtounsy International Airport.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required only for travellers arriving from high risk countries.

Mexico.notes: Visitors must obtain a Multiple Immigration Form. There is no charge for a tourist FMM for stays of less than 7 days when entering by land. For visitors staying more than 7 days and entering by land, it will cost 687 Mexican Pesos or nearly 40 USD. The FMM is required for all visitors entering via air, regardless of length of stay, and the cost is included in the traveler's airfare and remitted by the airline..

Myanmar.notes: e-Visa holders must arrive via Yangon, Nay Pyi Taw or Mandalay airports or via land border crossings with Thailand — Tachileik, Myawaddy and Kawthaung or India — Rih Khaw Dar and Tamu.. e-Visa is available for tourism only..

Namibia.notes: Available at Hosea Kutako International Airport..

Nauru.notes: Visas are issued with validity of 30 days.. Visa can be obtained in the Nauruan Press Office at the United Nations..

Netherlands.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

New Zealand.notes: International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy must be paid upon requesting an Electronic Travel Authority.. Holders of an Australian Permanent Resident Visa or Resident Return Visa may be granted a New Zealand Resident Visa on arrival permitting indefinite stay (pursuant to the Trans-Tasman Travel Arrangement ), subject to meeting character requirements and obtaining an Electronic Travel Authority prior to departure. Such travellers are not required to pay the International Visitor Conservation and Tourism Levy..

Nicaragua.notes: Tourist card must be purchased upon arrival..

Niger.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Nigeria.notes: Business eVisas-on-arrival available for "Frequently Traveled Business Persons of International Reputes" or "Executives of Multi-national Companies", as well as for government officials. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required if arriving from a country with a risk of yellow fever transmission..

North Macedonia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period.. Registration with the local police within 24 hours of arrival is mandatory..

Norway.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Oman.notes: Visa exemption valid for 10 days. Holders of a visa or entrance stamp of the Emirate of Dubai that is valid for at least 21 days are visa exempt.. Holders of a visa for Qatar that is valid for travel to Oman and valid for at least one month are visa exempt when arriving directly from Qatar..

Panama.notes: Denial of entry or transit to any person who has a criminal conviction..

Papua New Guinea.notes: Available at Gurney Airport (Alotau), Mount Hagen Airport, Port Moresby Airport and Tokua Airport (Rabaul)..

Paraguay.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Paraguay under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Peru.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Peru under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Poland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area.. 90 days within any 180-day period in the Schengen Area.. Dual nationals must use their Polish passport..

Portugal.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Romania.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Rwanda.notes: Visitors are fingerprinted.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required only if arriving from high risk countries as defined by WHO..

São Tomé and Príncipe.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Saudi Arabia.notes: Residents of GCC countries can apply for Saudi e-Visas online and residents of the United States, United Kingdom and European Union may apply for a visa on arrival.

Senegal.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Seychelles.notes: Application can be submitted up to 30 days before travel.. Visitors must upload a reservation confirmation(s) for each visitor's location of stay in Seychelles.. Yellow fever vaccination certificate is required if coming from endemic countries.. Payment of the fee (EUR 10) by credit or debit card.. Valid for one journey only and it expires once exit the country..

Sierra Leone.notes: International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

Singapore.notes: All visitors are fingerprinted upon arrival and departure.

Slovakia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Slovenia.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Solomon Islands.notes: 3 months within 12 months.. Visitors visa issued upon arrival for free..

South Africa.notes: Holders of passports without 2 blank pages may be refused entry..

South Sudan.notes: Obtainable online 30 days single entry for 100 USD, 90 days multiple entry for 200 USD and 180 days multiple entry for 350 USD.. Printed visa authorization must be presented at the time of travel..

Spain.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Sudan.notes: If arriving from a country of high yellow fever risk and stayed for more than 12 hours, then Yellow Fever vaccine required.. Exit visa required.. Registration within 3 days mandatory..

Suriname.notes: An entrance fee of USD 50 or EUR 50 must be paid online prior to arrival.. Multiple entry e-Visa is also available..

Sweden.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Switzerland.notes: 90 days within any 180 day period in the Schengen Area..

Syria.notes: Registration required within 15 days.. Persons with passports bearing Israeli visas or entry/exit stamps are not allowed to enter.. Visa not required for foreign citizens with proof of Syrian origin, such as an identification card or passport.. Dual-citizen males ages 17–42 need military service book.. If not forgiven by the military, dual-citizens may apply for a visit visa once a year through the embassy..

Tajikistan.notes: e-Visa holders can enter through all border points..

Timor-Leste.notes: Not available at all entry points.. For arrivals by air only.

Turkmenistan.notes: 10-day visa on arrival if holding a letter of invitation provided by a company registered in Turkmenistan with a prior approval from the Foreign Ministry. Visitors can apply to extend their stay for an additional 10 days.. When transiting between two non-bordering countries, visitors can obtain a Turkmenistan transit visa for a five-day stay. This must be applied for in advance at the Turkmenistan Embassy. Visitors must also submit copies of the visas for the country of entry into Turkmenistan and the country of departure from Turkmenistan. Visa fee is 20 USD..

Uganda.notes: Determined at the port of entry.. Must apply online at least 2 business days prior to travel.. Airlines may deny passengers permission to board flights to Uganda without proof that they had successfully applied for an e-Visa.. Ugandan immigration authorities may require additional documentation, including proof of a return plane ticket and detailed tour itinerary in Uganda.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required..

United Kingdom.notes: Up to 90 days if arriving from Ireland ( Common Travel Area )..

United States.notes: ESTA is valid for 2 years from the date of issuance.. ESTA is also required when entering the country by cruise ship or land.. A Form I-94 is required for entry into the United States by land. It carries a $30 fee and can be obtained either online or upon arrival.. Visa required for nationals of VWP countries who have travelled or been present in Iran, Iraq, Libya, North Korea, Somalia, Sudan, Syria or Yemen at any time on or after 1 March 2011 or Cuba at any time on or after 12 January 2021, or nationals of VWP countries who are also nationals of Iran, Iraq, North Korea, Sudan or Syria. Exceptions apply if the travel was in military or diplomatic service of the VWP country..

Uruguay.notes: National ID card accepted.. Chileans can live and work legally in Uruguay under the Mercosur (and Associated Members) immigration agreement with no requirement other than being a citizen at birth or a naturalized citizen for over 5 years, and passing a background check..

Vatican City.notes: Open borders but de facto follows Italian visa policy.. No foreign accommodations, residency restricted to Vatican citizens only..

Venezuela.notes: Registration mandatory.. Introduction of Electronic Visa System for Tourist and Business Travelers..

Vietnam.notes: e-Visa is valid for 90 days and multiple entry.. Phú Quốc visa exemption for up to 30 days..

Yemen.notes: Exit visa required for stays over 30 days.. Yemen introduced an e-Visa system for visitors who meet certain eligibility requirements (group travel of 10 or more people, business trips, and transit etc.)..

Zambia.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zimbabwe.. International Certificate of Vaccination or Prophylaxis required only travelers arriving from certain places as defined by Govertment. Please check the WHO 2020 Yellow Fever vaccination requirements document for exact list..

Zimbabwe.notes: Also eligible for a universal visa allowing access to Zambia.. Tourism purposes only..

Eritrea outside Asmara.notes: Travel Permit for Foreigners is required to travel outside of the capital..

Tristan da Cunha.notes: Permission to land required for 15/30 pounds sterling (yacht/ship passenger) for Tristan da Cunha Island. 20 pounds sterling for Gough Island, Inaccessible Island or Nightingale Islands..

Sahrawi Arab Democratic Republic.notes: Undefined visa regime in the Western Sahara, same entry requirements with Morocco, controlled territory..

Sudan outside Khartoum.notes: All foreigners traveling more than 25 kilometers outside of Khartoum must obtain a travel permit..

Protected and restricted areas of India.notes: Protected Area Permit (PAP) required for whole states of Nagaland and Sikkim and parts of states Manipur, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttaranchal, Jammu and Kashmir, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh.. Restricted Area Permit (RAP) required for all of Andaman and Nicobar Islands and parts of Sikkim.. Some of these requirements are occasionally lifted for a year..

Baikonur & Priozersk.notes: Special permission required for the city of Baikonur and surrounding areas in Kyzylorda Oblast, and the town of Priozersk near Almaty..

Kish Island.notes: Tourists for Kish Island do not require a visa..

Sabah and Sarawak.notes: These states have their own immigration authorities and a passport is required to travel to them, but the same visa applies..

Maldives outside Malé.notes: Tourists are generally prohibited from visiting non-resort islands without the express permission of the Government of the Maldives..

Palestine.notes: Travel to Gaza Strip may be restricted..

Gorno-Badakhshan Autonomous Province.notes: OIVR permit required.. Special permit required for Lake Sarez..

Tibet Autonomous Region.notes: Tibet Travel Permit required in addition to Chinese visa..

Mecca and Medina.notes: Non-Muslims and those following the Ahmadiyya religious movement are strictly prohibited from entry.

Closed cities of Turkmenistan.notes: A special permit, issued prior to arrival by Ministry of Foreign Affairs, is required if visiting the following places: Atamurat, Cheleken, Dashoguz, Serakhs and Serhetabat..

Yemen outside Sanaa or Aden.notes: Special permission needed for travel outside Sanaa or Aden..

Curaçao.notes: Maximum consecutive period of six months each calendar year..

Puerto Rico.notes: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program, for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required..

Sint Maarten.notes: Maximum stay allowed is 6 months uninterrupted with the possibility to extend.

U.S. Virgin Islands.notes: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program, for 90 days on arrival from overseas for 2 years. ESTA required..

Abkhazia.notes: Tourists from all countries (except Georgia) can visit Abkhazia for a period not exceeding 24 hours as part of an organized tourist group..

Brest and Grodno.requirement: Visa not required [ may be outdated as of February 2022 ]

Crimea.requirement: Visa not required [ may be outdated as of February 2022 ]

Jan Mayen.notes: Permit issued by the local police required for stays less than 24 hours. Permit issued by the Norwegian police required for stays of more than 24 hours..

Closed cities of Russia.notes: Several closed cities and regions in Russia require special authorization..

South Ossetia.notes: To enter South Ossetia, visitors must have a multiple-entry visa for Russia and register their stay with the Migration Service of the Ministry of Internal Affairs within 3 days..

Svalbard.notes: Anyone of any nationality may live and work freely in Svalbard per the Svalbard Treaty..

Guam.notes: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program ESTA required..

Northern Mariana Islands.notes: Visa not required under the Visa Waiver Program ESTA required..

Isla Apipé and Isla del medio.notes: By being Argentine territories, the same visa policy applies..

Galápagos.notes: 60 days; Visitors must pre-register to receive a 20 USD Transit Control Card (TCT)..

Falkland Islands.notes: A visitor permit is normally issued as a stamp in the passport on arrival, The maximum validity period is 1 month..

South Georgia and the South Sandwich Isl.notes: Pre-arrival permit from the Commissioner required (72 hours/1 month for 110/160 pounds sterling )..

Antarctica.notes: Special permits required for Bouvet Island, British Antarctic Territory, French Southern and Antarctic Lands, Argentine Antarctica, Australian Antarctic Territory, Chilean Antarctic Territory, Heard Island and McDonald Islands, Peter I Island, Queen Maud Land, Ross Dependency..
